Title: Requires insurers and health plans to grant automatic preauthorization approvals to eligible health care professionals in certain circumstance
Summary: Requires insurers and health plans to grant automatic preauthorization approvals to eligible health care professionals in certain circumstances.
LawCode: Amd §4902, Ins L; amd §4902, Pub Health L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the insurance law and the public health law, in relation to requiring insurers and health plans to grant automatic preauthorization approvals to eligible health care professionals in certain circumstances
